v.0.1.description:
Initial Release

Changes since prerelease:

- timed-out `Eudaimonia M.` (wasn't being nice)
- indicators for when a stage and character have checks
- made it so looping is better detected
- i am 99% sure i made `Room 1665` work, just be warry of that

## [README](https://github.com/SWCreeperKing/ArchipelagoSurvivors/blob/master/README.md)
v.0.1.title: v.0.1

v.0.1.1.description:
- [Client] fixed a bug that prevented stage checks from sending when looping/beating them
  - will retroactively send previously looped/beaten stages

## [README](https://github.com/SWCreeperKing/ArchipelagoSurvivors/blob/master/README.md)
v.0.1.1.title: v.0.1.1

v.0.1.2.description:
- [ApWorld] Fixed logic bug with region access

## [README](https://github.com/SWCreeperKing/ArchipelagoSurvivors/blob/master/README.md)
v.0.1.2.title: v.0.1.2

v.0.1.3.description:
- [ApWorld] Added "Random" option to characters and stages
- [Client] Added DeathLink 
  - can be enabled/disabled on the main menu
  - pausing can block deathlinks (this is to prevent crashes, please do not abuse)
  - you can not receive a deathlink within 4s of another
- [Client] Included a QoL mod, see readme

## [README](https://github.com/SWCreeperKing/ArchipelagoSurvivors/blob/master/README.md)
v.0.1.3.title: v.0.1.3

v0.2.description:
- [ApWorld] Added Enemysanity
- [ApWorld] Added Kill Director goal type
- [ApWorld] Added support for Universal Tracker
- [ApWorld] Fixed bug where eggs unlock wouldn't be added to the multiworld
- [ApWorld] Added logic for requiring hurry for `Beat with [character]` and `[stage] beaten` checks
- [ApWorld] Improved logic

## [README](https://github.com/SWCreeperKing/ArchipelagoSurvivors/blob/master/README.md)
v0.2.title: v0.2

v0.3.0.description:
- [ApWorld] Rewrote apworld to be autogenerated
- [ApWorld] Added Support for Balatro DLC
- [ApWorld] Improved logic
- [Client] Updated from MelonLoader 7.1 to 7.2
- [Client] Updated to work with versions of VS after Balatro update
  - Downpatching is no longer needed/required
- [Client] Cleaned up alot of code
- [Client] Server timeout increased to 1min

### IF YOU PREVIOUSLY INSTALLED THE MOD YOU WILL NEED TO INSTALL IT DIFFERENTLY AND MAKE SURE TO UPDATE MELON LOADER TO 7.2

## not backwards compatible with prev. apworld versions
v0.3.0.title: v0.3.0
